pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 11: creates file at this exact path with cat heredoc
setup_task.sh line 111: creates memo file at this exact path with cat heredoc
setup_task.sh line 7 creates exports directory; export_result.sh line 10 references this path
setup_task.sh line 7 creates exports directory; export_result.sh line 11 references this path
Memo change 1: 'Promote Michael Torres from VP Engineering to CTO'
Memo change 7: 'Add Hannah Wright as CHRO reporting to the CEO'
Memo change 2: 'Add Maria Santos as the new VP Product as direct report to CEO'
Memo change 4: 'Add Dr. Alex Patel as Dir. Data Science reporting to Michael Torres (CTO)'
Memo change 5: 'Rename Emily Davis title to Dir. Growth Marketing' (was Dir. Digital Marketing)
Memo change 6: 'Rename Robert Garcia to Dir. Sales Operations' (was Dir. Enterprise Sales)
Memo change 3: 'Move Rachel Kim to Operations department, change title to Dir. Quality Assurance' (was Dir. QA)
Memo change 8: 'Update Kevin Martinez title to Dir. IT & Security' (was Dir. IT)
Memo change 1: Michael Torres promoted from VP Engineering to CTO
Memo change 6: 'We are eliminating the SMB Sales division'
Memo change 6: 'Amanda White has left the organization' (was Dir. SMB Sales)
Memo change 5: Emily Davis title changes from 'Dir. Digital Marketing' to 'Dir. Growth Marketing'

Memo change 8 requires title to be 'Dir. IT & Security', but metadata claims 'Dir. IT' should be absent. The substring 'dir. it' appears in 'dir. it & security', which contradicts the absence requirement given verifier uses substring matching (verifier.py line 80-84)

Initial org chart has 17 shapes (1 CEO + 5 VPs + 11 Directors). Restructuring removes 1 shape (Amanda White) and adds 3 shapes (Maria Santos, Alex Patel, Hannah Wright). Final: 17 - 1 + 3 = 19 shapes. Verifier requires >= 17 (hardcoded in verifier.py line 93)

Initial edges: 5 (CEO to VPs) + 11 (VP to directors) = 16. Final edges: 7 (CEO to C-level) + 3 (CTO to dirs) + 2 (VP Mkt) + 1 (VP Sales) + 3 (VP Ops) + 2 (CFO) = 18 edges. Note: verifier does NOT check min_edges (not used in verifier.py)

Memo specifies 8 colors: Blue (Engineering), Teal (Product), Green (Marketing), Orange (Sales), Gray (Operations), Purple (Finance), Pink (HR), White (CEO default). Final diagram should have at least 7 distinct non-white colors. Verifier requires >= 4 (verifier.py line 105)

privileged_info_summary: The task involves updating a synthetic organizational chart for fictional company TechNova Inc. with 9 specific changes described in a restructuring memo: promoting Michael Torres from VP Engineering to CTO, hiring Maria Santos as VP Product, hiring Hannah Wright as CHRO, moving Rachel Kim to Operations with title change to Dir. Quality Assurance, hiring Dr. Alex Patel as Dir. Data Science, changing Emily Davis's title to Dir. Growth Marketing, renaming Robert Garcia to Dir. Sales Operations and eliminating SMB Sales division, and updating Kevin Martinez's title to Dir. IT & Security. The initial diagram contains 17 shapes and 16 edges. After restructuring, the diagram should contain 19 shapes, 18 edges, and apply 7-8 distinct department colors (blue, teal, green, orange, gray, purple, pink).
